concerns.text: Functional Requirement FR-030 (synthetic validation dataset generation) is not anchored to any user story; no story lists FR-030 as an anchored requirement.
Functional Requirement FR-031 (evaluation of inconsistency‑detection on synthetic data) is not anchored to any user story; no story lists FR-031 as an anchored requirement.
Success Criterion SC-030 (precision/recall/F1 on synthetic validation dataset) is not anchored to any user story; no story lists SC-030 as an anchored success criterion.
